1718170.name: RPG Maker MZ - Battle Girl characters Pack 1
1718170.description:
* This app will be retired from all stores effective June 29 2023. If youve already purchased it you can still use it as set forth under the terms of the EULA*

Look out men! These new girl battlers are here and they mean business! Add a fun yet dangerous female element to your game with these new Battle Girls. Featuring sprite sheets with Side View Actors, 8 Bust Ups, 2 Face Sheets with different hats / hoods, 8 Girl Enemies, 28 Battlebacks including school hallways, city grounds, sports stadiums, classrooms, lobbies, libraries, and more!

Features:

* 8 Side View Actors (2 sheets each)
* 8 Bust ups
* 16 Face sheets
* 8 Enemies
* 28 Battlebacks
* Formatted for use in RPG Maker MV/MZ

Terms of Use:

* This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
* OK to be used in Commercial projects
* Contents can be edited
* OK for use in games with gore
* OK for use in adult-rated games

** Please note before buying this pack: We are no longer offering support, updates or fixes for this pack
1718170.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 韩语
